# OpenTelemetry Ecosystem

> OpenTelemetry's thriving ecosystem of components, examples, integrations and vendors

---

LLMS index: [llms.txt](/llms.txt)

---

Section pages:

- [OpenTelemetry Demo](/ecosystem/demo/): The OpenTelemetry Demo is a microservice-based distributed system intended to illustrate the implementation of OpenTelemetry in a near real-world environment.
- [Registry](/ecosystem/registry/): Find libraries, plugins, integrations, and other useful tools for using and extending OpenTelemetry.
- [Adopters](/ecosystem/adopters/): Organizations that use OpenTelemetry
- [Third-party distributions](/ecosystem/distributions/): List of open source OpenTelemetry distributions maintained by third parties.
- [Integrations](/ecosystem/integrations/): Libraries, services, and apps with first-party support for OpenTelemetry.
- [Vendors](/ecosystem/vendors/): Vendors who natively support OpenTelemetry
